tips: Click on the [auto] icon in the battlefield, and you will fight automatically for 30 rounds.
Click on [Capture Pet] in the [Skill] panel when you find a pet in the battlefield, and you may catch it at a certain rate. (Make sure you have enough MP)
Open up the [package] and wear the item by right clicking it!
Click on [Quest] to check all your quests! (Done, In Progress and Card Collection)[Hotkey Alt+Q]

Open up the [package] and wear the item by right clicking it!
Go to Pet Curer (152.233) for more information about how to raise a pet!
Cycle Quest is started! Watch out please!! Each Cycle Quest requires different Level! That's important! And you'll get unexpected prize when you finish the Cycle Quest!
Pets will lose HP upon fighting, escaping and dying. To restore their HP, you can feed them with monsters alchemized in Mob Flask or Pet Food produced with the Compose skill.
Monster Location:  3-53-5
Pub Owner in Cloud City-Pub Owner. He can offer free accommodation for Level 10 and below Level 10 Players. Above Level 10 Players can fulfill your HP and MP here for little coins!
Pub Owner in Cloud City can accommodate you. Pay him a little money, and you can fully recover your HP and MP.
Press [Auto] for 30 rounds automatical attack in fight!
Grocer in Cloud City sells Mob Flasks of different level, potions that can be used during the battle and skill books.
Chelyn in Cloud City can provide you with warehouses.
Training Place:
EXP Manager in Cloud City can offer you double experience time!(7 hours every week)
Use the [Capture Pet] in [Skill] button to catch Zodiac Pet in field battle!(The capture countes the success rate)
You can repair your equipment and weapon at NPCs. Click [Repair All] to repair all your equipment.
Click the [Quest] to check quest state! (Finished, Unfinished, Finished but Uncommitted, Idiom Collection)Shortcut Key Alt+Q
When you reach level 10, you can go to Grocer to buy skill books and learn skills. Some of your attributes need to reach a certain number before you can learn a skill.
Buy the Skill Book at Grocer in Cloud City when you are at level 10. Skill Learning requires Attribute Point Please be careful when you add the attribute points.
You can't teleport from Chill Pass to Cloud City until you reach level 30.
Welcome to the festive Cloud City! Please consult Pet Curer for Pet Taming(152.233)!
Once you are possessed by a God, he/she will follow you for 10 minutes. The buff they give you stacks with your double EXP time.
Grocer in Cloud City sells Mob Flask and medicines using in fight at differe level!
Apollo can send you from the Heaven to the human world.
You can store your stuffs and coins at Chenlyn in Cloud City!
Press F12 to hide other players and their pets.
You can get double experience at EXP Manager in Cloud City!(7 hours once a week)

Training Place:
First start from Cloud City and then go through Fall Alley to Devil Deck! At last, you will get to Goal Manor!
Go to the pointed NPC for combination of weapons and equipment. Some materials and gems are required!
You can receive Idiom Quest when you are at Level 20! Finishing Idiom Quest you can obtain relevant Idiom Card~
Congratulaitons! You are qualified for receiving Idiom Quest. You'll get unexpectedly prizes when you collect Idioms!
Training Place:
Training Place:
You can repair your equipment and weapons at all major NPCs for different functions. Press [Repair All], you can fix all the equipment in Equipment Bar and package!
Blacksmith in Cloud City can help you combine soul weapons! Hurry up if you hold Growing Bead~
Training Place:
Training Place:
Training Place:
Players at or above level 30 are allowed to use the teleportation service from Chill Pass to Cloud City.

Start from Goal Manor, then passby Maple Valley and go through Trident Mountain. At last, you will reach Chill Pass! Captain of Lion guarding at the entrance of Trident Mountain is a tough guy. Be careful!
